title: Setting Up Redis Quiz
description: Test your knowledge about the critical role of Redis setup and configuration in modern web applications.

questions.question: Which of these technologies is recommended for starting a consistent Redis server during development?
What's the standard port number for a Redis server to listen for connections?
Which Node.js client library is popular for its support for Redis Clusters and Sentinels?
What's a critical security best practice for Redis in production?
options: Never making it accessible to the public internet; only allow internal connections from your backend.
Providing everyone with the Redis password for transparency.
Storing all passwords in plain text in the Redis database.

questions.question: What is 'Upstash' in the context of Redis?
options: A way to encrypt files using a secret key.
A cloud provider that offers serverless Redis instances.
A way to automatically compress files.
